Appearances:
Plaintiff Bi Yan Yu is present.
Attorney Ilene Hochstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Francisco J. Chirinos, Lucrecia Chirinos is present.
Attorney Salvatore C. Timpano special appearance for defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of MAR-26-2012 is vacated. (501/REQ)
